notes: Toscafund 250p cash offer. Board minded to recommend unanimously. Third PUSU extension to Aug 6 2026. Due diligence well advanced, financing being finalised. Mediclinic 30% stake uncommitted. NHS revenue decline Q1 2026 creates MAC risk. Theoretical paper trade.

Recommended all-cash offer 595p plus dividends 13.2p + 6.8p = 615p total. Board unanimous recommendation. Goldman Sachs independent advice. Scheme document published July 3. Shareholder vote July 28. 58.7% premium to pre-bid. CMA and FTC approval required. Strong deal — main risks are antitrust and shareholder vote dissent.
